members.name: Munich Pharmacies
members.description: Pharmacy locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

members.name: Munich Offices — All
members.description: Office-related locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass, including office=* and building=office features.

members.name: Munich Law Firms
members.description: Law firm office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Consultants
members.description: Consulting office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Real Estate Offices
members.description: Real estate office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Insurance Offices
members.description: Insurance office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Government Offices
members.description: Government office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Company Offices
members.description: Company office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Generic Office Buildings
members.description: Generic office building locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Other Offices
members.description: Other office-related locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Clinics
members.description: Clinic, doctor, and dentist locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

members.name: Munich Coworking Spaces
members.description: Coworking and startup workspace locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

members.name: Munich Restaurants
members.description: Restaurant, cafe, fast-food, bar, pub, and food-court locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

catalog.name: Munich Public Datasets
catalog.description: Official Munich public and open geodata organized by city-intelligence use case. Direct layers are included only when the endpoint is stable and does not require an API key.

members.name: Boundaries & Administration
members.description: Official Munich administrative boundaries, districts, and city administration geodata references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich District Boundaries
members.description: Official district and administrative boundary layers should be promoted to live layers only after confirming the exact no-key WMS/WFS/GeoJSON endpoint in Munich GeoPortal OpenGeodata: [GeoPortal OpenGeodata](https://geoportal.muenchen.de/portal/opendata/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Administration Datasets
members.description: Administrative datasets from the Munich Open Data portal are kept as references until a specific stable map service is selected: [Munich Open Data](https://opendata.muenchen.de/).

members.name: Transport & Mobility
members.description: Official Munich transport, traffic, and mobility datasets.

members.name: Munich Traffic Signals (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich Open Data WFS GeoJSON layer for traffic signals (Lichtsignalanlagen). Disabled by default.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Mobility Datasets
members.description: Munich mobility datasets include GTFS, counts, parking, and traffic resources. They are kept as references until each endpoint is selected and verified: [Munich traffic group](https://opendata.muenchen.de/group/tran).

members.name: Environment & Green Space
members.description: Official Munich environmental, green-space, climate, and green-zone dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Green Space and Environment
members.description: Green-space, environmental, and green-zone resources should be added as live layers only after the exact official no-key endpoint is verified in the Munich Open Data or GeoPortal catalogs: [Munich environment group](https://opendata.muenchen.de/group/envi).

members.name: Infrastructure & Utilities
members.description: Official Munich utility and city infrastructure datasets.

members.name: Munich Drinking Fountains (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich Open Data WFS GeoJSON layer for municipal drinking fountains. Disabled by default.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Charging Infrastructure
members.description: Charging-station resources are kept as references until the exact official no-key WMS/WFS/GeoJSON endpoint is confirmed in Munich Open Data or GeoPortal.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Public Toilets, Waste, Recycling
members.description: Public toilets, waste, and recycling datasets should be promoted only after a stable official service URL and layer name are verified.

members.name: Health & Public Services
members.description: Official Munich health, social, school, and public-service dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Health Datasets
members.description: Munich health datasets are available through the Open Data portal and should be added as live map layers only after a stable geospatial endpoint is selected: [Munich health group](https://opendata.muenchen.de/group/heal).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Schools, Kitas, Public Services
members.description: Education, culture, sport, and public-service resources are kept as references until a verified no-key map endpoint is chosen: [Munich education group](https://opendata.muenchen.de/group/educ).

members.name: Buildings & Urban Planning
members.description: Official Munich urban planning, building, land-use, and digital-city dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Buildings and Urban Planning
members.description: Urban planning, buildings, land-use, and digital-twin datasets should be added only after the precise official service URL is confirmed in Munich GeoPortal OpenGeodata: [GeoPortal OpenGeodata](https://geoportal.muenchen.de/portal/opendata/).

members.name: Open Data Portals / References
members.description: Official Munich portals used to promote reference items into verified live catalog layers.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Open Data Portal
members.description: Official Open Data Portal Munchen. Use this reference to inspect city datasets before adding a live layer: [opendata.muenchen.de](https://opendata.muenchen.de/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich GeoPortal OpenGeodata
members.description: Official Munich GeoPortal OpenGeodata reference. Add WMS/WFS/GeoJSON layers only after confirming the exact service URL and layer name: [GeoPortal OpenGeodata](https://geoportal.muenchen.de/portal/opendata/).

catalog.name: Germany Public Datasets
catalog.description: Official Germany-wide public dataset references, organized to mirror a national public data catalog without loading uncertain endpoints.

members.name: Basemaps
members.description: Germany-wide official basemap and topographic reference sources.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: basemap.de / BKG
members.description: basemap.de provides official German base-map products and open-data references. Kept as a catalog reference rather than a live layer until a specific no-key WMS/WMTS endpoint is confirmed for this prototype: [basemap.de](https://basemap.de/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: BKG Open Data
members.description: The Federal Agency for Cartography and Geodesy publishes Germany-wide open geodata. Add only exact verified services as live layers: [BKG Open Data](https://gdz.bkg.bund.de/index.php/default/open-data.html).

members.name: Administrative Boundaries
members.description: Germany-wide administrative and statistical boundary dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: German Boundaries and Administrative Geodata
members.description: Administrative and statistical boundary layers should be added only after confirming a stable official BKG/Destatis/GovData WMS, WFS, or GeoJSON endpoint with no API key requirement.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Destatis Regional Statistics
members.description: Destatis provides official German statistics, including regional data and maps. Kept as a reference until a specific no-key map endpoint is selected: [destatis.de](https://www.destatis.de/EN/Home/_node.html).

members.name: Transport
members.description: Germany-wide transport and mobility dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: GovData Transport
members.description: Use GovData to select Germany-wide transport datasets before adding a verified no-key service endpoint: [GovData](https://www.govdata.de/).

members.name: Environment
members.description: Germany-wide environment and climate dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: GovData Environment
members.description: National and state environment datasets are referenced through GovData until a specific stable no-key map service is selected: [GovData](https://www.govdata.de/).

members.name: Statistics
members.description: Germany-wide statistical and regional dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Destatis Statistics
members.description: Destatis regional and thematic statistics are kept as references until a stable map or file endpoint is selected for a specific analytical use case: [destatis.de](https://www.destatis.de/EN/Home/_node.html).

members.name: Infrastructure
members.description: Germany-wide infrastructure and utility dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: GovData Infrastructure
members.description: Infrastructure and utility datasets should be promoted from GovData references only after endpoint stability and no-key access are verified: [GovData](https://www.govdata.de/).

members.name: Open Data Portals / References
members.description: Official national portals used to discover live Germany-wide layers safely.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: GovData
members.description: GovData is Germany's official open government data portal. Use it to find national, state, and municipal datasets before adding a verified live layer: [govdata.de](https://www.govdata.de/).

catalog.name: Europe Public Datasets
catalog.description: Official Europe-wide public dataset references and stable EU geodata layers that do not require an API key.

members.name: Administrative / Statistical Boundaries
members.description: Official EU statistical geography layers from Eurostat/GISCO.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 0 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 0 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 1 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 1 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 2 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 2 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 3 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 3 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default. This can be heavier than level 0-2 and is not enabled at startup.

members.name: Environment
members.description: Europe-wide environmental public data references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: EU Environment Data
members.description: Environment datasets from European public portals should be promoted only after a specific stable no-key endpoint is selected: [data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/en).

members.name: Transport
members.description: Europe-wide transport public data references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: EU Transport Data
members.description: EU transport datasets are kept as references until a stable no-key WMS/WFS/GeoJSON endpoint is chosen: [data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/en).

members.name: Economy / Statistics
members.description: Europe-wide economy and statistical dataset references.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Eurostat Statistics
members.description: Eurostat statistical datasets are kept as references until a specific data product and stable delivery format are selected: [Eurostat](https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat).

members.name: Open Data Portals / References
members.description: Official EU portals used to discover and promote verified public layers.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: European Data Portal
members.description: data.europa.eu is the official portal for European data and includes search, geospatial search, API search, and high-value dataset discovery: [data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/en).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Eurostat GISCO
members.description: Eurostat/GISCO publishes EU geodata such as NUTS boundaries. Additional EU geography layers should be added only after confirming exact GeoJSON size and intended use: [GISCO NUTS GeoJSON](https://gisco-services.ec.europa.eu/distribution/v2/nuts/geojson/).

catalog.name: Demo / Visual Examples
catalog.description: Optional no-key visual examples restored as disabled catalog items. They are not part of startup and do not re-enable token-dependent terrain or old Australian demo catalogs.

members.name: Basemaps & Visual References
members.description: Optional public visual layers that can be manually enabled for context.

members.name: Natural Earth II (Optional Visual Layer)
members.description: Optional Natural Earth II raster tiles from Terria public datasets. Disabled by default and not used as the startup basemap.
members.attribution: Natural Earth II with Shaded Relief, Water, and Drainages

members.name: 3D / Local Examples
members.description: Local upstream 3D examples restored only when they do not require terrain services, tokens, live feeds, or external API keys.

members.name: Smooth Geelong Buildings glTF Mini Demo (Local)
members.description: Local CZML/glTF mini demo from the upstream example assets. This restores an optional 3D visual without loading token-dependent terrain.
members.attribution: geelong_mini_demo_bin_linux_v1.0-draft_x64.gltf was created using a dataset obtained from the City of Greater Geelong. The original dataset is licensed under the CC BY 3.0 AU.

members.name: Reference / Not Enabled: Geelong Terrain Demo
members.description: The terrain-aligned Geelong CZML example is intentionally not restored as a live layer because this prototype avoids terrain-dependent demo behavior.

members.name: Reference / Not Enabled: Low-Poly Bus Live Feed Demo
members.description: The local bus model asset exists, but the upstream live vehicle example depends on an external transport API feed and is intentionally not restored.

item.name: Natural Earth
item.attribution: Natural Earth II - From Natural Earth. Public Domain.
